name: 算計揭底型
description: 女主在勝利後揭露自己的全盤計劃，讓所有人（包括觀眾）恍然大悟。這類對白是整個佈局的收束點，帶來智力層面的爽感。

examples.drama_title: 【ENG DUB】From Convict to Heiress: The Real Daughter's Revenge
examples.excerpt: You showed my video publicly just to make Brother and Chen betray you to your face. That way, you could inherit the Fu family fortune. Exactly. ... So, don't try any tricks from the start. You knew everything. Deliberately plotting against Yiny.
